key.name: dictionary-paths
key.description: List of directories to scan for Stardict dictionaries.

key.name: max-results
key.description: Maximum number of results displayed in the search list.

key.name: fuzzy-threshold
key.description: Maximum edit distance for fuzzy matching (Levenshtein distance).

key.name: window-width
key.description: Default width of the main window in pixels.

key.name: window-height
key.description: Default height of the main window in pixels.

key.name: dict-order
key.description: Ordered list of dict keys (format: Kind:Name).

key.name: baidu-appid
key.description: App ID for Baidu LLM Text Translation API.

key.name: baidu-apikey
key.description: API Key for Baidu LLM Text Translation API.

key.name: dict-active-states
key.description: List of dict active states (format: Kind:Name=true/false).
